title: Aurora, 82058, Palm Pals Queenie Bee 5In, Soft Toy, Yellow & Black
features: Introducing Palm Pals Queenie Bee, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Queeny, dazzling with elegance, reigns supreme, as she is a top-tier bestie who will treat you like royalty. Queenie Bee is a yellow and black coloured cute and cuddly bee soft toy, filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Queenie Bee is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable bee-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Critters collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Queenie Bee measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable yellow and black coloured bee which has a cute smiling face with a pair of antennae and wings at the back. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
